problem id: 97eb9131
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10100011 -> 00110010
  10011110 -> 11100010
  11110101 -> 01010011
  01101000 -> 10000001
  00001010 -> 10100000
  10001110 -> 11100010
  11110010 -> 00100011
  00101101 -> 11010000
  00001001 -> 10010000

query: 01111010
predicted answer: 10100001
